positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition of a whimsical forest creature (like a fox or woodland spirit) leaping through giant, bioluminescent ferns. The scene must feature strong, contrasting silhouettes against a vibrant, neon-tinged twilight background. Use a color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, burnt orange, and lime green. The art style should mimic stained glass illustration meets modern vector art, giving clean, sharp edges and bold patterns. Focus on a central, dynamic pose for the creature, ensuring the foreground elements are decorative and repeatable for apparel print. Cinematic volumetric lighting, maximal detail, high contrast, clean lines, mythic, kawaii aesthetics.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, low resolution, poorly drawn, ugly, tiling, repetitive pattern (unless intended), extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photorealistic, logo, signature, celebrity, anime, graffiti, messy lines
